## Summary

What changed and why?

## Scope

- [ ] Firmware / control
- [ ] PC tool / protocol
- [ ] Mechanical / CAD
- [ ] Simulation / URDF
- [ ] Documentation only

## Validation

List commands, hardware checks, screenshots, or simulations that were run. If a target toolchain or physical test was unavailable, state that explicitly.

## Safety and compatibility

- [ ] Motor order, direction, PWM limits, and neutral are unchanged or documented.
- [ ] Protocol changes are reflected in `docs/protocol.md` and the PC tool.
- [ ] Control changes include gain/limit rationale and a safe test plan.
- [ ] Generated files, caches, logs, and replacement ZIP archives are not included.

## Known limitations

What still needs review or testing?
